cdc_travel_notices.title: Level 2 - Chikungunya in Costa Rica
cdc_travel_notices.summary: There is an outbreak of chikungunya in Guanacaste Province, Costa Rica. Most cases have been reported in Playa Langosta. You can protect yourself by preventing mosquito bites.

cdc_travel_notices.title: Level 2 - Ebola Bundibugyo Virus Disease in the Democratic Republic of the Congo and Uganda
cdc_travel_notices.summary: The Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) and Uganda are experiencing outbreaks of Bundibugyo virus disease (BVD). CDC recommends practicing enhanced precautions for travel to Uganda or to provinces in the DRC other than those affected by the outbreak.  Country List :  Democratic Republic of the Congo, Uganda Country List :  Democratic Republic of the Congo, Uganda

cdc_travel_notices.title: Level 3 - Ebola Bundibugyo Virus Disease in Parts of the Democratic Republic of the Congo
cdc_travel_notices.summary: The Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) is experiencing an outbreak of Bundibugyo virus disease (BVD) in Haut-Uélé, Ituri, Nord-Kivu (North Kivu), and Tshopo provinces. CDC recommends avoiding nonessential travel to these provinces.

cdc_travel_notices.title: Level 1 - Diphtheria in Haiti
cdc_travel_notices.summary: There is an outbreak of diphtheria in Haiti. Vaccination against diphtheria is essential to protect against the disease.

cdc_travel_notices.title: Level 1 - Global Dengue
cdc_travel_notices.summary: Dengue is a year-round risk in many parts of the world, with outbreaks commonly occurring every 2–5 years. Travelers to risk areas should prevent mosquito bites.                   Country List :  Colombia, Samoa, Mali, Vietnam, New Caledonia (France), Timor-Leste (East Timor), Guyana, Maldives, Bolivia, Tonga, Cambodia

cdc_travel_notices.title: Level 2 - Malaria in Yemen
cdc_travel_notices.summary: Increased cases of malaria have been reported in Yemen, including in areas that were previously considered low-risk.

cdc_travel_notices.title: Level 1 - Hepatitis A in Canada
cdc_travel_notices.summary: Manitoba, Canada is currently experiencing a hepatitis A virus (HAV) outbreak. HAV is contagious and spreads through close person-to-person contact and by eating contaminated food or drink.

cdc_travel_notices.title: Level 2 - Chikungunya in French Guiana
cdc_travel_notices.summary: There is an outbreak of chikungunya in French Guiana. You can protect yourself by preventing mosquito bites.

cdc_travel_notices.title: Level 2 - Malaria in Mayotte
cdc_travel_notices.summary: Increased cases of malaria have been reported in Mayotte. Malaria is spread by the bite of infected mosquitoes.

cdc_travel_notices.title: Level 1 - Diphtheria in Sub-Saharan Africa
cdc_travel_notices.summary: There are outbreaks of diphtheria in several countries in Africa. Vaccination against diphtheria is essential to protect against the disease.  Country List :  Chad, Guinea, Niger, Nigeria, Mali, Mauritania, Somalia Country List :  Chad, Guinea, Niger, Nigeria, Mali, Mauritania, Somalia Country List :  Chad, Guinea, Niger, Nigeria, Mali, Mauritania, Somalia

cdc_travel_notices.title: Level 2 - Chikungunya in Mauritius
cdc_travel_notices.summary: There is an outbreak of chikungunya in Mauritius. You can protect yourself by preventing mosquito bites.

cdc_travel_notices.title: Level 1 - Ciguatera Fish Poisoning in Vanuatu
cdc_travel_notices.summary: There is an outbreak of ciguatera fish poisoning in Vanuatu.

cdc_travel_notices.title: Level 2 - Meningococcal Disease in the Democratic Republic of the Congo
cdc_travel_notices.summary: There is an outbreak of meningococcal disease in the Mangembo Health Zone of Kongo Central Province. The best way to protect yourself is to get meningococcal vaccination.

cdc_travel_notices.title: Level 2 - Yellow Fever in Venezuela
cdc_travel_notices.summary: An increased number of cases of yellow fever have been reported throughout Venezuela.

cdc_travel_notices.title: Level 2 - Global Polio
cdc_travel_notices.summary: Some international destinations have circulating poliovirus. Before any international travel, make sure you are up to date on your polio vaccines.          Country List :  Afghanistan, Algeria, Benin, Cameroon, Chad, Côte d'Ivoire (Ivory Coast), Democratic Republic of the Congo, Niger, Nigeria, Pakistan, Somalia, Yemen, Sudan, Guinea, Angola, Senegal, Ethiopia, Republic of South Sudan, Djibouti, Israel, the West Bank and Gaza, Germany, Poland, United Kingdom, including England, Scotland, Wales,

cdc_travel_notices.title: Level 2 - Chikungunya in Suriname
cdc_travel_notices.summary: There is an outbreak of chikungunya in Suriname. You can protect yourself by preventing mosquito bites.

cdc_travel_notices.title: Level 2 - Chikungunya in Bolivia
cdc_travel_notices.summary: There is an outbreak of chikungunya in Santa Cruz and Cochabamba Departments, Bolivia. You can protect yourself by preventing mosquito bites.

cdc_travel_notices.title: Level 2 - Chikungunya in Seychelles
cdc_travel_notices.summary: There is an outbreak of chikungunya in Seychelles. You can protect yourself by preventing mosquito bites.

cdc_travel_notices.title: Level 1 - Rocky Mountain Spotted Fever in Mexico
cdc_travel_notices.summary: Illness and death due to Rocky Mountain spotted fever (RMSF) have been reported in the northern region of Mexico along the U.S. border, particularly in Baja California, Sonora, Chihuahua, Coahuila, and Nuevo León.

cdc_travel_notices.title: Level 2 - Yellow Fever in Colombia
cdc_travel_notices.summary: An increased number of cases of yellow fever have been reported in Colombia.

cdc_travel_notices.title: Level 1 - Global Measles
cdc_travel_notices.summary: Measles cases are rising in many countries around the world. All international travelers should be fully vaccinated against measles with the measles-mumps-rubella (MMR) vaccine, according to CDC's measles vaccination recommendations for international travel. Country List :  Afghanistan, Benin, Cameroon, Central African Republic, Chad, Côte d'Ivoire (Ivory Coast), Democratic Republic of the Congo, Djibouti, Ethiopia, Indonesia, Liberia, Nigeria, Pakistan, Republic of the Congo , Senegal, Somalia,

cdc_travel_notices.title: Level 1 - Extensively Drug-Resistant Typhoid Fever in Pakistan
cdc_travel_notices.summary: An outbreak of extensively drug-resistant (XDR) typhoid fever in Pakistan is ongoing. Extensively drug-resistant infections do not respond to most antibiotics.
